name: eLocal
title_tag: Add Your Business to ELocal with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
eLocal + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on eLocal with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is eLocal?

eLocal is an online platform that provides listings and information about local businesses and services. It assists users in finding and connecting with businesses in their area, making it a useful tool for consumers and businesses alike.

Why eLocal + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on eLocal, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to eLocal through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on eLocal.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on eLocal, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate eLocal + Synup?

The eLocal integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the eLocal integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the eLocal logo to manage the Synup + eLocal integration and associated settings.

seo.title: eLocal
seo.description: Elevate your business visibility. Synup integration on eLocal ensures accurate information for maximum online impact.
